add_a_batch_of_guests_to_a_luma: Add a batch of guests to a Luma event from a list of emails and names.
applied_guest_status_or_looked_up_event_: Applied guest status or looked-up event status
create_a_luma_event_with_a_name_start: Create a Luma event with a name, start time, timezone, description, and visibility.
custom_message_for_the_invite_email: Custom message for the invite email
describe_the_end_date_e_g_end_of: Describe the end date (e.g., "end of this month")...
describe_the_end_time_e_g_2_hours: Describe the end time (e.g., "2 hours after start", "8pm")...
describe_the_guests_to_add_e_g_invite: Describe the guests to add (e.g., "invite john@example.com and jane@example.com")...
describe_the_start_date_e_g_beginning_of: Describe the start date (e.g., "beginning of this month")...
describe_the_start_time_e_g_next_friday: Describe the start time (e.g., "next Friday at 6pm EST")...
email_luma_event_invitations_to_a_list_o: Email Luma event invitations to a list of prospects with an optional custom message.
event_details_id_name_startat_endat_time: Event details (id, name, startAt, endAt, timezone, durationInterval, createdAt, description, descriptionMd, coverUrl, url, visibility, meetingUrl, geoAddressJson, geoLatitude, geoLongitude, calendarId)
event_hosts_id_name_firstname_lastname_e: Event hosts (id, name, firstName, lastName, email, avatarUrl)
guest_email_address_or_guest_id: Guest email address or guest ID
integrate_luma_into_the_workflow_can_cre: Integrate Luma into the workflow. Can create, update, look up, and cancel events, list calendar events, manage guest lists (get one or many, add guests, send invites, and update approval status).
list_of_events_each_with_id_name_startat: List of events, each with id, name, startAt, endAt, timezone, durationInterval, createdAt, description, descriptionMd, coverUrl, url, visibility, meetingUrl, geoAddressJson, geoLatitude, geoLongitude, calendarId
list_of_guests_id_email_name_firstname_l: List of guests (id, email, name, firstName, lastName, approvalStatus, registeredAt, invitedAt, joinedAt, checkedInAt, phoneNumber)
manage_events_and_guests_on_luma: Manage events and guests on Luma
number_of_guests_added_add_guests_operat: Number of guests added (Add Guests operation)
number_of_guests_invited_send_invites_op: Number of guests invited (Send Invites operation)
optional_message_included_in_the_invite_: Optional message included in the invite email (max 200 characters)
public_event_url_to_look_up: Public event URL to look up
pull_a_luma_event_guest_list_optionally_: Pull a Luma event guest list, optionally filtered by approval status, for follow-up or enrichment.
pull_the_luma_guest_list_and_prepare_per: Pull the Luma guest list and prepare personalized reminders for upcoming registrants.
resolved_event_api_id_lookup_event_opera: Resolved event API ID (Lookup Event operation)
review_pending_luma_registrations_and_ap: Review pending Luma registrations and approve, waitlist, or decline each guest.
single_guest_id_email_name_firstname_las: Single guest (id, email, name, firstName, lastName, approvalStatus, registeredAt, invitedAt, joinedAt, checkedInAt, phoneNumber)
whether_a_matching_event_was_found_looku: Whether a matching event was found (Lookup Event)
whether_to_email_the_guest_about_the_cha: Whether to email the guest about the change
